title: Ashen + Globox_Z Mods Support
description: A small, 16x pack adding rudimentary compatibility between Ashen 16x and several of Globox_Z's mods
body:
![About](https://i.imgur.com/nMG1TNv.png)

Want to play Ashen with mods like [LevelZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/levelz) and [JobsAddon](https://modrinth.com/mod/jobsaddon)? Tired of certain GUI elements using vanilla textures and looking out of place with Ashen? Then this Add-On is for you!

Currently, this Add-On provides support for [LevelZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/levelz), [JobsAddon](https://modrinth.com/mod/jobsaddon), [PartyAddon](https://modrinth.com/mod/partyaddon), and [LibZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/libz). I intend to eventually support most (if not all) of Globox_Z's mods.

Place this pack *above* Ashen in your load order.
___

This pack is designed and intended for use with [Ashen 16x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen/) and several of [Globox_Z's mods](https://modrinth.com/user/Globox1997).
___
